commands.review_summary:
The PR threads stored ClawScan summaries into blocked skill/plugin version emails, preserves fallback scanner copy, and expands the scan report ZIP README guidance.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a feature PR. Source inspection confirms current main emits generic blocked-version reasons, and the PR adds tests for summary use, fallback copy, and one-line truncation.

target.title: Use ClawScan summaries in blocked version emails
target.body:
## Summary

- Use the stored ClawScan summary as the `Reason:` value in blocked skill/plugin version emails when available, with the existing generic scanner copy as fallback.
- Thread the public-safe summary through malicious artifact audit metadata and notification scheduling for skills and plugins.
- Expand scan report ZIP `README.md` copy so owners can understand the report files and how to interpret ClawScan, suspicious/malicious states, and VirusTotal telemetry.

## Verification

- `clawhub scan download maxhub-tiktok --version 3.7.3 --output /tmp/clawhub-scan-maxhub-tiktok-3.7.3.zip --site https://clawhub.ai --registry https://clawhub.ai`
- Verified `maxhub-tiktok@3.7.3` ClawScan summary from the stored report: "This skill is framed as a TikTok data assistant but includes documented capabilities for platform manipulation, access-control evasion, and sensitive credential/session handling."
- `bunx vitest run convex/lib/emails.test.ts convex/users.test.ts convex/httpApiV1.handlers.test.ts convex/skills.rateLimit.test.ts convex/packages.public.test.ts`
- `bun run ci:static`
- `bunx tsc --noEmit --pretty false` (run by autoreview)
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --parallel-tests "bun run ci:static"`

## Autoreview

Clean: `autoreview clean: no accepted/actionable findings reported`.
